title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.570 - Rulemaking — procedure
text:
354.570.  Rulemaking — procedure. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated pursuant to sections 192.068, 354.603, 376.423, 376.1353, 376.1356, 376.1378, 376.1387, * 354.560, 354.562 and 354.563 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated in accordance with the provisions of chapter 536.
(L. 1997 H.B. 335 § 14) 
 *Section number "376.1390" appears in original rolls, but was not enacted by H.B. 335, 1997.
